Guitar Program

Guitar Lessons ORDS Music School

Build clean chords, rhythm, tone, and confidence for modern playing.

Guitar Program

What you'll learn.

Personalized lessons that help students grow musically and confidently.

Chords & Rhythm

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Technique

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Worship Playing

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Who Can Join?

Guitar Lessons for every skill level.

Whether you're just starting or ready to refine your skill, ORDS helps students grow with personalized instruction and musical discipline.

01
Beginners

Start with clean chords, strumming, timing, and simple songs that make practice feel possible.

02
Worship Guitarists

Build rhythm, tone, transitions, and parts that fit well in a live worship mix.

03
Pedalboard Coaching

Understand signal flow, tone shaping, effects choices, and practical pedalboard setup.

Book Free Consultation
The ORDS Team

Learn from experienced mentors.

Students receive guidance from people who care about skill, discipline, confidence, and musical growth.

Guitar Instructor

Osiel

Osiel teaches practical musicianship with discipline and clarity, helping students build timing, technique, confidence, and worship-ready playing.

@osielelbajista
Guitar Coach / Pedalboard FX

Jorge Saenz

Jorge specializes in contemporary guitar, tone, technique, and musical expression, with coaching for pedalboards and confident live playing.

@jasaenz
The ORDS Experience

More than lessons.

A place to build discipline, confidence, creativity, and musical excellence.
